{"id":"ibudget-2nm","title":"Fix Appearance.setColorScheme crash on web","description":"Appearance.setColorScheme() from React Native doesn't exist on web. Once a user toggles the theme in Settings, the saved preference triggers this call on every subsequent page load via _layout.tsx lines 84-88, causing a full-screen Expo error overlay on every navigation. Guard with Platform.OS \\!== 'web' check and use CSS-based approach for web theme switching.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T22:31:54Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-03-07T22:31:54Z"}

new_value: Guarded Appearance.setColorScheme with Platform.OS check in _layout.tsx and settings/index.tsx. Web uses document.documentElement.style.colorScheme instead. Verified via Puppeteer - no crash on theme toggle or subsequent navigation.
